name: slide-library-powerpoint-mvp
description: Local pilot MVP of a corporate slide library for Microsoft PowerPoint.

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && npm run certs:ensure && concurrently --kill-others --names server,addin --prefix-colors blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @slide-library/server" "npm run dev -w @slide-library/addin"
scripts.dev:browser: npm run build:shared && concurrently --kill-others --names server,addin --prefix-colors blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @slide-library/server" "npm run dev:browser -w @slide-library/addin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @slide-library/shared && npm run build -w @slide-library/server && npm run build -w @slide-library/addin
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck -w @slide-library/server && npm run typecheck -w @slide-library/addin && npm run typecheck:tools
scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm run test -w @slide-library/server && npm run test -w @slide-library/addin
scripts.check: npm run validate-library && npm run validate-manifest && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.sideload: npx --yes office-addin-debugging start apps/addin/manifest.xml desktop --app powerpoint
